title: VINA'S CLOSET - 211info
text: VINA MOSES CENTER VINA'S CLOSET Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A smaller version of Vina's Free Thrift Store with clothes, hygiene items, household goods, shoes, and more. Items vary by donation and are not guaranteed. Services are offered at two locations in collaboration with Alsea School District and South Benton Resource Center. 968 NW Garfield Avenue Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: Must reside in area of closet locations and meet their eligibility criteria Hours: Monroe: Tuesday 10am-noon, South Benton Resource Center, 648 Orchard Street, Monroe, OR 97456 Alsea: By appointment with Alsea School District staff. Location will be provided when appointment is confirmed. Email (541) 487-5664 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 487-5664 Alsea Schools Family Outreach Main phone (541) 745-8759 South Benton Resource Cnter Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Rural service areas of Alsea School District and South Benton Food Pantry (Benton County only) TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Front entrance on Garfield Avenue (ramp access) with public parking on the street Corvallis Transit System bus stops nearby Services: General Clothing Provision Personal/Grooming Supplies Shoes Small Kitchen Appliances Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - VINA'S FREE THRIFT STORE TEMPORARY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - VINA'S AID If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
